description_long: This is a compact, rectangular cash register with a metallic and plastic exterior, featuring a raised display screen and a keypad with multiple colored buttons. The front side has a prominent keypad, a cash drawer slot, and a small receipt printer slot. The top section includes a dual display: one facing the operator and a smaller one for the customer, both likely LCD screens. The right side reveals a card reader slot, while the back is mostly solid with minimal features. The cash register sits on a circular wooden platform, suggesting it is designed for countertop use in retail or service environments. The overall design is modern, functional, and typical of point-of-sale systems found in urban shops and stores.
description: A modern, metallic and plastic cash register with a raised dual display, colorful keypad, cash drawer, and card reader, set on a wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keypad, cash drawer slot, dual display screens, and a speech bubble with a power symbol.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the card reader slot and the profile of the raised display screens.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel and the rear of the display screens, with minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Left side view displaying the curved housing and the side profile of the keypad and display screens.
attribute_keypad_layout: numeric grid with approximately 30 keys, including colored function and number buttons
